title: Crispy Mexican Avocado Pilaf with Dark Chocolate Chips
description: A herbal and crisp date-night dish featuring dark chocolate chips in a slow-cooked avocado pilaf that's nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 can black beans, rinsed and drained

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced avocados and diced onions to the pan, cook for about 5 minutes until softened.
Stir in rinsed black beans, salt, cayenne pepper, dried herbs, and chopped dates. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes allowing everything to combine well.
Transfer mixture into a slow cooker (or use high heat if preferred), stir in dark chocolate chips before serving.
